item.title: The Three Guardians of 2FA
item.description: After the Authy meltdown and the ongoing LastPass fallout: 22 authenticator apps compared. Three survive, five get kicked out.
item.author: Stefan-Olav Hüllinghorst

item.title: ICE 541, from little-b to big-B
item.description: €90 ticket. €11.50 coffee and a roll. Free of charge: getting barked at in the dining car by someone in the worst possible mood. Service means SERVICE.
item.author: Stefan-Olav Hüllinghorst
